jobs.title: AI Applications Ops Lead, GPS
jobs.content: <p>As an <strong>AI Applications Ops Lead</strong> on the Global Public Sector team, you'll drive operational excellence across federal-government engagements on the Scale Donovan defence-AI surface and the Scale GenAI Platform. You’ll partner with technical stakeholders to identify and win major opportunities and you'll work cross-functionally with Engineering, Product, and Customer Success to scale the public-sector book.</p><p>You'll work from our San Francisco headquarters and travel to Washington, DC and other federal sites as required. You’ll also work with the Scale Spellbook team on workflow automation for federal customers.</p><div class="content-intro"><em>Scale AI is the data infrastructure for AI.</em></div>

jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer, Enterprise GenAI
jobs.content: <p>Scale AI’s <strong>Enterprise GenAI</strong> team is looking for an Applied AI Engineer to build and deploy LLM-powered applications on the Scale GenAI Platform for Fortune 500 customers. You'll work across Python, TypeScript, and the Scale Data Engine to ship inference pipelines, fine-tuning workflows, and RAG systems used by enterprise teams across financial services, healthcare, and retail.</p><p>You’ll partner with the Scale Studio annotation team and the Scale Forge synthetic-data team to drive a roadmap that scales the Enterprise GenAI flagship to global customers across North America, EMEA, and APAC. The role is fully remote within the United States.</p>
